title: Umea Heavy Rain Alert
lead: Umea is experiencing heavy rain with a critical z-score of -4.60. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Umea is causing significant disruptions, with 86% humidity and winds of 8.6 km/h. 
 The city is expected to see significant flooding, with a high risk of damage to infrastructure and property. 
 The HDD value of 17.1 GG indicates a high energy demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols and monitor the situation closely.
